text:
There once was an owl who loved nothing else.

Every night when darkness fell.

He'd fly upwards.

His head'd gleam.

Frost.

Then?

He'd sleep.


In the morning sun?

It dawn'd.





































































That owl.

You see.

That owl?

A watcher.

























That owl?

You.




That.

Think.















































You think?

I think.

Just.

Think.









































Think owl.







































That owl.

I.











That owl.








Thought.





















































































Oh.

That thoughts.


That odd.




That owl.







































.

















































































































































































Such thoughts.

Such thoughts.







Such thoughts.

Why?











































































Such.































Why owl?































It wonders.





































It thinks.



That.





















































.









































































That.



Such.





























































































Oh.







Just.
